data.content: Shipment review approved on main. Verified commit 3f1f81f15b7c is present on origin/main and tagged on the knot as commit:3f1f81f15b7c. Confirmed the shipped implementation renders cli pills for Claude/Codex/Gemini and parses OpenCode model paths so /openrouter/mistral/devstral-2512 displays as Mistral Devstral 2512 with openrouter and cli pills. Re-verified with bunx tsc --noEmit, the focused unit test file, a production build, and successful GitHub Actions runs (CI, Coverage Badge, Changesets) for the same commit on 2026-03-08.
